case_title: DOUGLAS FARQUHAR, EIRIK O'NEAL, DAVID VOGELER AND et al VS LAMBERT, GEORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DOUGLAS FARQUHAR, EIRIK O'NEAL, DAVID VOGELER AND AND MICHAEL WEISSMAN DBA SCARLET THEORISTS AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERT, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO GEORGE LAMBERT RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS FARQUHAR, EIRIK O'NEAL, DAVID VOGELER AND AND MICHAEL WEISSMAN DBA SCARLET THEORISTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMBERT, GEORGE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO ROCKY MCGILL FOR SIGNATURE.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DOUGLAS FARQUHAR FOR THE SCARLET THEORIST REC'D, AND SENT TO ROCKY MCGILL FOR ANSWER.
MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF. $14.00 ENTERED) 15 DAY WAITING PERIOD APPLIES.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED BY COMMISSIONER MCGILL. ORDER MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
